preToolUse.description: Warn when editing runbooks without updating last-reviewed date
preToolUse.command: if echo $TOOL_FILE | grep -qE 'runbook|RUNBOOK'; then echo REMINDER: update last-reviewed date and on-call owner in the runbook header; fi; true

postToolUse.command: if echo $TOOL_FILE | grep -qE '\.md$' && echo $TOOL_FILE | grep -qE 'runbook|RUNBOOK'; then npx markdownlint $TOOL_FILE 2>/dev/null || true; fi; true
if echo $TOOL_FILE | grep -qE 'slo.*\.ya?ml$'; then npx --yes ajv-cli validate -s slo.schema.json -d $TOOL_FILE 2>/dev/null || true; fi; true
